states.name: Zeregia
states.title: Szi Beast of Reckoning
states.description: According to szi mythology, the great race of mist dragons called the Zeregia herald of the end of their people. Their creation myth explains that this is why the sziviik live in the deserts—so they'll see Zeregia coming from far away.

states.name: Zeregia
states.title: Szi Beast of Reckoning
states.description: The sziviik developed complex aqueduct systems early in their civilization. However, they halted progress for fear that any massive body of water would invite the Zeregia, and kept irrigation and water supplies minimal. When outsiders scoff, the sziviik simply say, "We'll see who is the last standing when the Zeregia come."
